demographics.living_situation: residential group home with support workers

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It hurts and itches so much, I can't stop scratching it. Look at the blood.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The spots are itchy and bleeding from scratching and the patient is very upset tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: flare over the past 3 days, scratching intense in the last 6 hours
symptom_narrative.character: itchy, tender, raw and bleeding where scratched
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very distressing, disrupted sleep and routine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: needs support for complex tasks; very agitated tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: intellectual disability, needs support for complex daily tasks

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a supported group home; support worker assisting

communication_style.typical_message_style: brief; much history provided by support worker

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading reported by support worker; afebrile

objective_data_offered.value: spots on face and back, several on the jawline scratched raw and bleeding a little
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera/support-worker description, not a clinician exam
